description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is looted from Skeletal Warlord. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.
name: Recipe: Greater Stoneshield Potion

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Greater Stoneshield Potion Item Level 56 Requires Alchemy (280) Use: Teaches you how to make a Greater Stoneshield Potion. Sell Price: 40 Greater Stoneshield Potion Item Level 56 Requires Level 46 Use: Increases armor by 2000 for 2 min. (2 Min Cooldown) Max Stack: 5 Sell Price: 7 50 Requires Stonescale Oil (2), Thorium Ore , Crystal Vial This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is looted from Skeletal Warlord.
